vocab.meaning: không đeo gì trên cổ tay
vocab.example: To be honest, I've been bare-wristed for years since I started relying exclusively on my smartphone for timekeeping.

vocab.meaning: vật bất ly thân/thói quen cố định
vocab.example: A mechanical watch has been a habitual fixture on my left wrist since my graduation.

vocab.meaning: vật trang trí mang tính thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I view my watch less as a tool and more as an aesthetic embellishment that rounds off my formal look.

vocab.meaning: bộ máy tự động (của đồng hồ)
vocab.example: I'm fascinated by the internal automatic caliber that powers my watch through the natural motion of my arm.
Having a watch allows me to navigate my hectic schedule without constantly fumbling for my phone.

vocab.meaning: cái nhìn lướt qua kín đáo
vocab.example: During long meetings, an unobtrusive glance at my wrist is far more polite than checking a digital screen.
I prefer watches that run on kinetic energy as they eliminate the need for frequent battery replacements.

vocab.meaning: chiếc đồng hồ bền bỉ/hầm hố
vocab.example: When I go hiking, I always opt for a rugged timepiece that can withstand shocks and water exposure.

vocab.meaning: phong cách cá nhân riêng biệt
vocab.example: Choosing a vintage watch is my way of adding a touch of personal flair to an otherwise standard corporate outfit.

vocab.meaning: ý thức về sự trôi chảy của thời gian
vocab.example: Wearing a watch helps me maintain a sharper sense of temporal awareness throughout my workday.
